scripts.sync-docs: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');function cp(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=p.join(s,f),dp=p.join(d,f);if(f==='.vitepress')continue;fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?cp(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cp(p.resolve(__dirname,'../docs'),p.resolve(__dirname,'docs'))"
scripts.dev: npm run sync-docs && vitepress dev docs
scripts.build: npm run sync-docs && vitepress build docs
